# Aincrad Minecraft Server
Aincrad is a server fork of Paper Minecraft, which is a fork of Mojang's own Minecraft server code.
The heart of the Minecraft server lives in "NMS" - net.minecraft.server, located in this repository at paper-server/src/minecraft/java/net/minecraft.
Patches to the NMS code are located in paper-server/patches.
The Paper API, which is a forked extension of the Bukkit API, allows plugin access to most of the Minecraft code via injections and events. It's located in the paper-api directory.

# Instructions
DO NOT MAKE ANY MODIFICATIONS WITHOUT CONFIRMING FIRST!
